Explanation:
Reviewing the MVP column shows Mauro Biello won in 1997 and 1998, the only consecutive years for any MVP winner. No other player appears in back-to-back years. While Biello also won in 2001 and 2005, those are not consecutive. Hence, Mauro Biello is the only player to win MVP in consecutive years.
